SUBSCRIPTION.NOT_SUBSCRIBED: You are not subscribed to this service (code: 1003)

GENERATION.GET_GENERATIONS: Unable to retrieve the list of generations (code: 2000)
GENERATION.GET_ALLOCATION_KEY: Unable to retrieve the allocation key (code: 2002)
GENERATION.SAVE_KEY: Unable to save the allocation key (code: 2004)
GENERATION.DELETE_KEY: Unable to delete the allocation key (code: 2006)
GENERATION.GET_ALGORITHMS: Unable to retrieve the list of algorithms (code: 2008)
GENERATION.STORAGE_UPLOAD_FAILED: Unable to upload the source file (code: 2013)

BRUTE_FORCE.DESCRIPTION: Exhaustive enumeration of allocation keys by combining distribution algorithms

OLAGSA.DESCRIPTION: Linear Optimization and Genetic Algorithm with Atypical Speciation

ITERATIONS.TITLE: Number of iterations
ITERATIONS.DESCRIPTION: Number of iterations of the genetic algorithm.

POPULATION_SIZE.TITLE: Population size
POPULATION_SIZE.DESCRIPTION: Number of individuals in the initial population.

CROSSOVER_RATE.TITLE: Crossover rate
CROSSOVER_RATE.DESCRIPTION: Crossover rate between two individuals of the same species (between 0 and 1).

INTER_SPECIES_CROSSOVER_RATE.TITLE: Inter-species crossover rate
INTER_SPECIES_CROSSOVER_RATE.DESCRIPTION: Crossover rate between two individuals of different species (between 0 and 1).

MUTATION_RATE.TITLE: Mutation rate
MUTATION_RATE.DESCRIPTION: Probability that a new individual mutates (between 0 and 1).

EXPECTED_SPECIES_COUNT.TITLE: Expected species count
EXPECTED_SPECIES_COUNT.DESCRIPTION: Expected number of species. If iterations = 3, the species count will be 4^x, where x is the parameter value.

MAX_GENERATIONS_WITHOUT_IMPROVEMENT.TITLE: Max generations without improvement
MAX_GENERATIONS_WITHOUT_IMPROVEMENT.DESCRIPTION: Maximum number of generations without improvement before stopping the process.

ITERATIONS.TITLE: Number of iterations
ITERATIONS.DESCRIPTION: Number of nested brute-force enumeration iterations. Must be 1, 2, or 3.
